3050689.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
3050689.transcript: First things first. We have to bring him down.

jp.text: なんである。倒すほかなし。
jp.literal: No matter what, I have no choice but to defeat you!

5114994.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
5114994.transcript: Even the smallest sparrow flies unbound.

jp.text: ウチ使って見せましょ！
jp.literal: Let's show them what we've got!

9209772.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
9209772.transcript: Their numbers are many, but we are mightier!

jp.text: 敵が多いわ。油断せず行きましょう。
jp.literal: There are a lot of enemies. Let's go without getting careless.

12732071.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
12732071.transcript: Strength is built by time and diligence.

jp.literal: Every day, I just keep on honing my skills.

13937220.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_PL0000_2
13937220.transcript: I feel the same about you!

jp.literal: Hmm... I wonder if it's no good...

25486550.label: PL1400_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
25486550.transcript: Small wings may beckon a storm.

28498650.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
28498650.transcript: I never thought I'd be dueling the Dragon of Destruction.

jp.text: 破壊の龍の化身と、相対することになるなんてね
jp.literal: To think I'd end up facing the embodiment of the Dragon of Destruction...

31640156.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
31640156.transcript: I do not wield my art. I live it.

jp.text: 一刀を持って切り伏せ
jp.literal: I'll take the lead and cut through!

32666645.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
32666645.transcript: On the battlefield, I do not see so much as feel.

jp.text: うん。心で見れば、ついていける。
jp.literal: Hmph. If you look with your heart, you can follow.

jp.text: ええ、ただでは終わらせない
jp.literal: Huh? I won't let you get away with that!

jp.text: アビソリュート・ゼロ！

39197113.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
39197113.transcript: To pierce the skies and shatter the earth!

jp.text: 天を突きて、大地を砕かん。

jp.literal: I won't let you get away!

jp.text: ありがとう、ロゼッタさん

ニュゥゥッ！
泡沫無限！
私たちが守るわ！絶対に！

jp.literal: I'll take the lead and charge forward!
I won't let my concentration waver.
I'll keep going too, big sister!

jp.text: みんな早く！急がなきゃ！
jp.literal: Everyone, hurry! We need to rush!

82821348.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish
82821348.transcript: Thank you for keeping our spirits up!

jp.text: ビーチャンの応援のおかげね！
カタリナさん、すごいわね。

84930318.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
84930318.transcript: This is where it ends, Lilith!

jp.text: 結着をつきましょう！ニリス！
連携ならば、私たちに武器があるわ！
jp.literal: If we link, we've got a chance.

93573182.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_overdrive
93573182.transcript: Why? It will only prolong the suffering.

jp.literal: I'll tell you the truth about my sword.

jp.text: お姉さんに任せておいて
隠れてないで、出ておいで！

110038052.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
110038052.transcript: With one slash I paint the ground red!

jp.literal: I'll crush you in one blow!

jp.text: ありがとう、団長ちゃーん
トゥルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルルル

jp.literal: No need to be so formal.

121000039.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_fullchain
121000039.transcript: Harmony is the basis of power.

129401865.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
129401865.transcript: It was all because you broke their line!

jp.text: ゼタさんが崩してくれたおかげだよ！

131340751.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
131340751.transcript: I need to thank Maglielle properly when this is over.

jp.text: マギラフリラ将軍の援護に感謝ね
jp.literal: Thanks for the support, General Magiraphurira.
To wake abruptly from a dream...

137905780.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_PL0000_3
137905780.transcript: I trust you with my life!

jp.text: んふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふ

jp.literal: I have to live up to your expectations!

jp.text: 立ち止まってはいられないわね
jp.literal: I can't afford to stop now.

jp.text: ありがとう！団長ちゃ～ん！

146646867.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
146646867.transcript: I shall call on your aid again, Rackam!

jp.text: ラカムさん、次もお願いね。
jp.literal: Rackam, please do it again next time!

146970097.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
146970097.transcript: Please get out of our way!

jp.literal: I'll have to move out of the way.

148226500.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
148226500.transcript: Strong as the earth, and yet gentle as a breeze.

jp.text: 合計出撃。頼りになるわね。

149497548.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_B
149497548.transcript: Is this really how it ends?

jp.literal: I can't go on like this...

150152057.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
150152057.transcript: What fierce attacks! You're amazing, Zeta!

jp.text: 鋭い攻撃。さすがはゼータさんね。
jp.literal: Sharp attack. As expected of you, Zeta.

150633643.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
150633643.transcript: It's as if your sword is guided by the stars!

jp.text: 流星降臨。見事な立ち筋ね。
jp.literal: Meteor Procession? What a magnificent stance.

154090942.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
154090942.transcript: We do seem to have a special connection.

jp.text: うん、次もこの調子でいこっか！
jp.literal: Hmph. Let's keep this momentum going!

jp.text: わかったわ。私に任せて。

jp.literal: Got a good grip on it.

jp.text: 行ってずつ攻め入りましょう！

169560429.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
169560429.transcript: Careful not to trip and fall... or get blown up!

jp.text: トドメとなるまで、油断はできない！
jp.literal: I can't afford to let my guard down until the final blow.

176357061.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
176357061.transcript: Your mastery of the whip is impressive!

jp.text: フェリちゃんって、ムチが似合うわね。
jp.literal: Ferry-chan, the whip really suits you.

182498197.label: PL1400_vo_ATK_ability_7_kagura_3
182498197.transcript: Swift as thought, certain as death!

jp.text: ウゾウムゾ！キリステン！
お姉さんがついてるからね！
ブルー・デトネーション！

193645904.label: PL1400_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
193645904.transcript: You're right. They've been lost to anger.

jp.text: まさに熾烈ハシ。油断しないで。
お姉さん、助かっちゃった
おねえさんにまかせて
バザラガさんがそれを言う？

200187630.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
200187630.transcript: Hit that dragon with everything you've got!

jp.text: あ、きらめす！せめつづけましょう！
jp.literal: I won't give up. Let's keep pressing the attack!

jp.text: まだ油断してはダメよ。
jp.literal: You still can't let your guard down.

jp.text: ハナカゼ、ミハナダマイ！

jp.literal: Hey, move out of the way.

jp.text: フィフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフフ

225459098.label: PL1400_vo_ETC_lockon_5
225459098.transcript: All rivers lead to the sea.

jp.text: 水の引く期に着くがごとし
jp.literal: I'll take this chance to strike while the iron is hot.

jp.text: ことごとく断ち切ろう！

jp.literal: I'm so glad to see you, big sister!
I still can't let my guard down.

238060885.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
238060885.transcript: A candle consumes itself while giving light to others.

jp.text: ありがとう、ランスロットさん

251131083.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
251131083.transcript: And yet there are still greater heights to climb.

jp.text: 団長ちゃんに褒められちゃった！
jp.literal: I got praised by the captain!

jp.text: ルリアちゃん、ごめんね

258404217.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain_NP0000
258404217.transcript: Your support means everything to me!

jp.text: ルリアちゃんの応援のおかげね！

263588800.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
263588800.transcript: Let's see which of our spirits burns the brighter!

jp.text: 奇炎万丈。私も負けてはいられないわ。
jp.literal: I can't afford to lose either.

268760894.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0100
268760894.transcript: Run, and you hasten toward destiny.

jp.text: シンラバンショウ キリフセン
jp.literal: Setsuna, Kyokasuigetsu, Transient, Apex of Nothingness, Crescent Moon, Dance of Pink Petals, Dance of Blue Petals, Utter Devotion, Butterfly Effect: Moonrise
I'll take care of the enemy too.

jp.text: ただでは終わらせない！
jp.literal: I won't let you get away with this!
I'll do my best, big sister!

270765527.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
270765527.transcript: A warrior of virtue needs only one mind.

jp.text: 忠勇無双。素晴らしい剣技ね。
jp.literal: You're amazing, Lancelot. That was a splendid display of swordsmanship.

273780194.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_1
273780194.transcript: To move mountains, one must carry stones.

jp.text: ただひたすらに、剣山あるのみ。
レッドデトネーション！
このまま押し切りましょう！

281045832.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
281045832.transcript: Even the formless cloud can give rise to a storm.

jp.text: 切迫表紙。まるでフェリちゃんを表す言葉ね。
jp.literal: Desperate declaration... It's just like a word that represents Ferry.

284631598.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
284631598.transcript: You'll pay for what you've done!

294760409.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
294760409.transcript: May my blade weave through stormy winds!

jp.text: まとった風ごと断ち切りましょ！
jp.literal: Let's cut through the wind like a blade!

302118848.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
302118848.transcript: Would you like to find out?

305210480.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_PL0000_2
305210480.transcript: Yes! We were like twin storms!

jp.text: ええ！息ぴったりだったね！
jp.literal: Huh? That was a perfect timing!
I won't let you get away!
I'll give you a taste of my power!

310377565.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
310377565.transcript: There is beauty to be found even on the battlefield.

jp.text: 花は歌い、蝶は舞う。これ以上ない組み合わせね。
jp.literal: Flowers sing, butterflies dance. There's no better combination than this.
I won't let you get away!

315053847.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
315053847.transcript: All journeys begin with a step.

jp.text: もっと強く！もっと高みへ！

320893494.label: PL1400_vo_ETC_lockon_4
320893494.transcript: The first step decides the course of battle.

323568282.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
323568282.transcript: You won't get the best of us!

jp.text: ここで倒れるわけにはいかない！
jp.literal: I can't afford to fall here!

332312415.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
332312415.transcript: Master yourself to master your foe.

jp.text: 影すら斬って見せましょう
jp.literal: Let's cut through even the shadows.

332620329.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
332620329.transcript: I was only protecting the crew.

jp.text: 少しの間、敵から離れて！
jp.literal: Stay back from the enemy for a bit!

jp.text: さすがね、団長ちゃんだって。

350081879.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
350081879.transcript: It is the dance of the butterfly.

jp.literal: This is the name of my blade.

jp.text: カニさん、ここにいたのね
jp.literal: Kanisa, you were here all along.

jp.text: ああああああああああああああああああ

jp.literal: I won't let you get away!

358383168.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
358383168.transcript: It's as if this clash were fated.

364242620.label: PL1400_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_4
364242620.transcript: The squall breaks before morning light.

jp.text: ひょうふはちょうおえず
jp.literal: The storm is just getting started.

jp.text: さあ次！まだまだ油断できないわ！
jp.literal: Alright, next. Can't let my guard down yet.
I'll do my best, big sister!

381758697.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
381758697.transcript: I know I've felt this sinister chill before.

jp.text: この黒き霊気は、いったい...
jp.literal: This black blood... what on earth...

386123132.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
386123132.transcript: Seek the truth, and the world will find you.

jp.text: 新人隊官？よく見えてるのね。

389289896.label: PL1400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
389289896.transcript: All limits are in the mind.

jp.text: プロミネース・フルール！

400079095.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
400079095.transcript: I must shed all needless movement.

jp.literal: I won't let you stand in my way.

402137868.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
402137868.transcript: It was your power that got us this far.

jp.text: ねえ、あなたのおかげね。

402536608.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
402536608.transcript: I hope nothing has happened to the Catalyst.

jp.text: 触媒、見つかるといいのだけど
うふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふ

411230416.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
411230416.transcript: Will I ever be like him?

jp.text: あの人に近づけたかな？
jp.literal: Did I get closer to that person?

421361497.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
421361497.transcript: On the narrow path of war, one misstep leads to certain death.

jp.text: ありがとう、ヴェインさん

425382050.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
425382050.transcript: This is for all the lives you've uprooted, Lilith!

jp.text: 思いの力に報いてみせる！
jp.literal: I'll show you the power of my will!

432615479.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
432615479.transcript: Only because you did such a wonderful job!

jp.text: シャルロッテちゃんのおかげだよ

jp.literal: Hm hm, leave it to me!

jp.text: 団長ちゃんですごいね！

436776982.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
436776982.transcript: I won't rest until you're vanquished!

jp.text: この身、朽ちようと！押し止める！

440549901.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
440549901.transcript: The wizened tree oft has the strongest roots.

jp.text: ロー、キ、オ、シュ。さすがね、オイゲンさん。

447251116.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
447251116.transcript: I will not lose to the likes of you!

jp.text: その槍では、私には届かない！

449339462.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
449339462.transcript: I follow only the surest road to success.

jp.text: ええ、どういたしまして。

451791602.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
451791602.transcript: Focus on the enemy at hand!

jp.text: 今は目の前の敵に集中！
jp.literal: Right now, I'm focusing on the enemy in front of me.
I won't let you get away!

462882737.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
462882737.transcript: So my form is still wild and undisciplined?

jp.literal: Still... just a few more to go.

471851149.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
471851149.transcript: This won't end well for you.

jp.literal: No matter how many times I do it, it's useless.

472143586.label: PL1400_vo_ATK_ability_7_3
472143586.transcript: Swift as thought, certain as death!

jp.literal: I'll show you the true meaning of death!

479527154.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
479527154.transcript: Did that have any impact at all?

jp.text: どこまで通じているのか
jp.literal: I wonder how far it reaches.

486457362.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_5
486457362.transcript: Before the body, one must forge the mind.

jp.text: ニャイバを持って幻想を断ち切らん
jp.literal: I'll cut through illusion with my twin blades.

jp.text: 強化などさせてるものか！
jp.literal: I won't let you get any stronger!

jp.text: みんないい技を持っているわ
終わらせましょう！イド！

504319731.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
504319731.transcript: Our current path will lead to victory!

jp.text: こちらこそ、助かっちゃった。
jp.literal: You're the one who helped me!
I have to hurry to the back!

jp.text: イオちゃん、すごかったわ！
副領補佐、まさに影の英雄ね。

jp.literal: I wonder if you're doing okay?

jp.text: ありがとう、ルリアちゃん
おねえさん、次もがんばるからね！
jp.literal: Sis, I'll do my best next time too!

528045542.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
528045542.transcript: Fate is the current you cannot fight.

jp.text: 水の引く時に着くがごとし
jp.literal: I'll be your guide through the waters of fate.

jp.text: さよなら。つまらぬものよ。
グレンノーコラプション！

541515354.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
541515354.transcript: Feel the lash of my blade!

jp.text: はっはっ！舞い踊りなさい！
jp.literal: Hah! Come and dance with me!

548063495.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
548063495.transcript: I'm so thankful for this crew!

jp.text: みんながいると心強いな
jp.literal: It's reassuring to have everyone here.

549525171.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_PL0000_2
549525171.transcript: I'll support you to the bitter end!

jp.text: ねっ、ふふっ、この調子ね！

557452634.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
557452634.transcript: Thank you for answering my call.

jp.text: 繋いでくれてありがとう
jp.literal: Thanks for linking up with me.

jp.text: だっちゃっちゃ、大丈夫？

561851595.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
561851595.transcript: You're right. I mustn't lose focus.

jp.text: ただでは終わらせない！
jp.literal: I won't let you get away with that!

jp.text: ガランツァ将軍の後に続きましょう！
jp.literal: Let us follow in General Gallanza's footsteps!

jp.text: えっ、あ、ぐ、頑張るっつー！

577752266.label: PL1400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
577752266.transcript: Like candlelight kissed by a breeze.

jp.text: このまま畳みかけましょう！

582489292.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
582489292.transcript: You dare stand in my way?

jp.text: 道を塞ぐ者は、すべて斬る！
jp.literal: I'll cut down everything that blocks my way!

584422981.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
584422981.transcript: Next time, I will finish it in one stroke.

jp.text: 次は一撃で仕留めなきゃ
jp.literal: Next, I'll finish you off with one hit.

585586834.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C
585586834.transcript: Yes! I must find my center of focus!

jp.text: ええ、もっと集中しなきゃ
jp.literal: Huh? I need to focus more.
